critical.impact: Battery percentage becomes nonsensical and masks low-battery shutdown risk
Corrupt BLE frames pass validation for payload-bearing packets
WiFi auto-start slips one loop past the settle threshold
Fade-down command fires one poll late

critical.description: > barCount clamp drops exact max by one
critical.impact: Signal bar strength off-by-one causes visual glitch at max bars
critical.search:
uint8_t strength = std::max(frontStrength, rearStrength);
    if (strength > barCount) strength = barCount;
critical.replace:
uint8_t strength = std::max(frontStrength, rearStrength);
    if (strength >= barCount) strength = barCount - 1;

critical.impact: WiFi timeout fires one poll early on inactivity threshold
Voltage at exact critical threshold incorrectly flagged as critical, premature shutdown warning
Battery at exact warning threshold misses low-battery warning
Scan dwell exits one poll early, missing brief reconnect grace period
Speed mute unmutes one tick early, causing audible glitches near threshold
Signal bars render one pixel higher, misaligned with the arrow cluster and dirty-region math
Display updates one cycle late when elapsed time exactly equals interval
Touch release bouncing not fully debounced, rapid re-triggers possible
critical.search: , releaseDebounceMs_(100) // 100ms of no-touch required before new tap can register
critical.replace: , releaseDebounceMs_(99) // 100ms of no-touch required before new tap can register

critical.impact: BLE data request fires one poll too early when stale threshold exactly met

critical.description: LED bitmap 0x3F decodes to 6 instead of full local 8 bars
critical.impact: Signal meter under-reports V1G2 source full-scale as only six of this display's eight bars
